relationships.description: The diffusion process specifically concerns groundnut varieties
The diffusion is assessed within the Kolokani region
Kolokani is a region located in Mali
Farmer-to-farmer interaction is a method of variety diffusion
Improved varieties are specific types of groundnut
Access to essential inputs is required to increase productivity
Seed is categorized as an essential input
Access to information affects the diffusion of varieties
These solutions aim to improve the availability of essential inputs
